---
title: "Reflection"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<section class="editorial-page">
  <div class="editorial-page-head">
    <div class="editorial-page-index">/REFLECTION</div>
    <h1>Reflection & Learning</h1>
  </div>

  <section class="editorial-block">
    <div class="editorial-subhead">
      <div class="editorial-mini-index">01</div>
      <h2>What I Learned</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-body-copy">
      <p>
        Building this portfolio helped me think more carefully about how academic work can be presented in a professional format. It required me to organise content, make design decisions, and reflect on which experiences best represent my development.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-grid editorial-grid-two">
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Challenges</h3>
      <p>
        One of the main challenges was balancing design, structure, and technical setup. I learned that a portfolio should not only look appealing, but also remain clear, functional, and easy to navigate.
      </p>
    </article>
    <article class="editorial-cell">
      <h3>Skills Developed</h3>
      <p>
        This process strengthened my digital presentation skills, attention to detail, problem solving, and ability to communicate professional identity through online content.
      </p>
    </article>
  </section>

  <section class="editorial-block">
    <div class="editorial-subhead">
      <div class="editorial-mini-index">02</div>
      <h2>Future Direction</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="editorial-body-copy">
      <p>
        Moving forward, I want to continue building experience in business analysis, marketing, and professional communication. This portfolio represents both what I have learned so far and the direction I hope to continue developing in the future.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>
</section>
```
